question: Does the evidence mention rear camera failure?

evidence.title: NHTSA recall 20V771000
evidence.content: Honda recalled certain 2018-2020 Accord vehicles because a Body Control Module software error may disable the rearview camera and exterior lights.

evidence.title: NHTSA complaint 11747287
evidence.content: The driver reported all dashboard warning lights were on while driving a 2020 Honda Accord.

question: Does the evidence mention dashboard warning lights?

evidence.title: NHTSA complaint 11747287
evidence.content: The driver reported all dashboard warning lights were on while driving a 2020 Honda Accord.

evidence.title: NHTSA recall 20V771000
evidence.content: A Body Control Module software error may cause rearview camera, exterior lighting, and window malfunctions.
